arts.sum: Despite pushing for the Champions League places, Rayo Vallecano have lost their last two La Liga games, although they have faced tough opposition in Villarreal and Barcelona. Sevilla go into this on...

arts.ttl: Preview: Rayo Vallecano vs. Sevilla - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Rayo Vallecano and Sevilla, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
